author: jsamudio
body:
#### PR description:

Backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50391. See the original PR for the full description.

#### PR validation:

Validated on top of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50711 in HCAL only matrix tests and HLT timing measurement on 2026 data.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

This is a backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50391 to `16_0_X`  for data taking.
title: [16_0_X] Alpaka multi-block optimization for MD PF clusterizer
